name: vibe-resume
description: Turn your AI coding history (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Cline, Continue, Aider, Windsurf, Zed AI, ChatGPT/Claude.ai/Gemini/Grok/Perplexity/Mistral/Poe exports, ComfyUI/Midjourney/Suno/ElevenLabs, git commits) into a versioned, reviewer-scored résumé across 10 locales with Markdown / DOCX / PDF output and an 8-point reviewer audit. Bundles the ai-used-resume skill.

interface.longDescription: Generate, tailor, review, and trend a versioned résumé from AI coding and git history.
defaultPrompt: Generate my résumé from AI coding logs and git history.
Tailor my résumé bullets for this job description.
Review and score my latest résumé draft.
